subcodes.first_line: O Rahim! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the All-Merciful, from the Prison precincts. Verily, there is none other God but He, the Omnipotent, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رحیم اسمع ندآء ربک الرحیم عن جهه السجن انه لا اله الا هو المقتدر العزیز الکریم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital
